name: testWaitForHILAPISignalGeneratorLoaded
title: testWaitForHILAPISignalGeneratorLoaded
description: Waits until a signal generator created with HILAPICreateSignalGenerator is fully loaded and ready to start.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Handle of the signal generator that shall be waited for.

return: <0: An internal error occurred, e.g. a protocol error or a faulty configuration of the diagnostic layer.
